title: P1 UX：拔日期籤改日卡點選聯動、清除前台技術字串、日出日落標日期、72h 地區標籤放大

context.background: Third user hands-on round produced UX-level feedback. All items are frontend-layer; the backend already returns the full week + normalized 72h slices + target-date-focused advice and sunrise per query (cached), so the interaction redesign needs no schema change. User's product insight: the date chips duplicate the 7-day forecast cards, and the only true query variable is the region — date should be selected by clicking the day cards themselves.
context.user_decisions: 行前建議 stays (one-line conclusion on top of the data; future Gemini mount point). Date chips are removed entirely.

in_scope: U1 remove ALL technical/internal strings from the visible UI: mode labels (rule-based / frontend mock / gemini), data-source strings (mock:frontend-fallback, F-D0047-*, cache/source metadata), and anything describing runtime internals. EXCEPTION: when the rendered data is mock (backend mock mode or frontend network-failure fallback), show exactly one small friendly badge 示範資料 with no further technical detail. Keep technical detail available in console.log or data-* attributes for debugging if desired
U2 sunrise/sunset card labels the travel date it applies to, e.g. 7/5（日）日出 05:12 · 日落 18:48; reword the approximate-source line to friendlier copy (e.g. 參考 2025-06-29 天文資料) while keeping honesty
U3 72h chart header: move the 縣市＋鄉鎮 label into the large empty center area of the title row and enlarge its font for readability; keep it bound to the queried result
U4 remove the 旅遊日期 chip row from TripForm — the form becomes 縣市 -> 鄉鎮 -> 查詢天氣 only; default focus after query is today

U5 make the 7-day forecast cards clickable and keyboard-accessible: clicking a day highlights it and switches 行前建議 and 日出日落 to that date via a lightweight re-query of the same town+date (backend cache makes this near-instant); preserve scroll position — do not jump the page; visually indicate the selected card and add a subtle hover/cursor affordance so clickability is discoverable
U6 tests: form submits with region only; day-card click updates advice/sunrise and highlight; no technical strings render in any mode; mock badge appears only for mock data
out_of_scope: Any change to the 72h chart data pipeline (only the header label moves/resizes)

requirements: R1: No regression of prior cards: local-date correctness (Asia/Taipei), stable full-week cards, stable normalized 72h chart, target-date advice focus, sunrise exact-date lookup, UV wording, 368-town two-stage form
R2: Mock mode end-to-end intact; deterministic tests unaffected
R3: English-only code comments; no secrets in tracked files
R4: Visible-error behavior from the tz-fix card stays: 4xx shows an error, mock fallback only on network failure (now with the 示範資料 badge instead of technical strings)
acceptance_criteria: AC1: ruff + pytest + frontend tests + npm run build all pass
AC2: UI renders zero technical mode/source strings in live and mock modes; mock data shows only the single 示範資料 badge
AC3: Sunrise/sunset card shows the selected travel date and updates when a different day card is clicked
AC4: 72h chart header shows the enlarged 縣市＋鄉鎮 label in the center area
AC5: Date chips are gone; clicking each of the 7 day cards switches highlight + 行前建議 + 日出日落 without full page reload or scroll jump
AC6: Default view after a region query focuses today with full week + chart visible
AC7: Changes committed per-AC and pushed to origin
operational_notes: Live-mode town codes are CWA-sourced (e.g. cwa-65000260); read from live /api/towns before manual testing.
Ports 18082/5173 are free at dispatch time; use them or any free ports for live verification and clean up afterward.
Backend responses are cached per town+date, so per-click re-query is the intended cheap mechanism for advice/sunrise switching — do not duplicate advice logic client-side.

report_template.location: Ubuntu agent-bridge reports path or repo-local equivalent used by the current workflow

user_one_liner: Simplify the UI per user review: remove the date-chip row and make the 7-day cards the date selector (click switches advice + sunrise via cached re-query), purge all technical mode/source strings from the frontend (single 示範資料 badge for mock data), label sunrise/sunset with its travel date, and enlarge/center the place label on the 72h chart header.
next_task_hint: After acceptance: redeploy the Ubuntu demo for user re-test; remaining backlog is Gemini activation, MOENV AQI, and actual cloud deploy (waiting on deploy auth).
